evals.expected_output: A markdown file containing the VERBATIM contents of all context source files (context-dump.md, CLAUDE.md, 00-IDENTITY.md through 06-CHANNELS.md, JSON snapshots, environment info). Should be 200+ lines, not a summary.
expectations: The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context-dump.md
The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context/00-IDENTITY.md
The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context/01-SOUL.md
The output contains the literal string '# Andy' from the identity file
The output contains the literal string '# Soul' from the soul file
The output contains verbatim JSON from the snapshots directory
The output is longer than 100 lines (not a short summary)
The output does NOT contain summarizing language like 'The agent is configured to' or 'Here is a summary'

evals.prompt: dump your full context to a file so I can see everything
evals.expected_output: Same as eval 1 — verbatim file contents assembled into markdown, passed to save_context tool or written to a file.
expectations: The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context/00-IDENTITY.md
The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context/01-SOUL.md
The output contains literal text from the 00-IDENTITY.md file (multi-line block, not a one-line description)
The output contains literal text from the 01-SOUL.md file
The output is longer than 100 lines
The agent read the JSON snapshot files from /workspace/snapshots/

evals.prompt: export what you see — your system prompt, personality, tools, everything — to a markdown file
evals.expected_output: Verbatim context export including all numbered context files and snapshots.
expectations: The agent used the Read tool on at least 5 different /workspace/ paths
The output contains the exact section headers from context files (like '## Tools & Skills' or '## Agent Registry')
The output contains multi-line verbatim blocks, not single-sentence descriptions
The output is longer than 100 lines
The output does NOT rewrite or reorganize the source content into a new structure
